creator: webmaster@andreas-diem.at
text:
> Are you using FreeBSD?
> If so, more information will be needed;
> uname -a
I have this bug on all three servers, this three server use FreeBSD 10.1.

FreeBSD kalimdor 10.1-RELEASE-p24 FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p24 #0: Mon Nov  2 12:17:28 UTC 2015     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

> svn info /usr/ports
I use portsnap.

> What version of portmaster are you using?
Version 3.17.7

> Was it built from your ports tree, or did you use pkg to install it?
All ports are builded from the ports tree.
